name: One-Pan Potatoes and Chicken Santa Fe
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 lb (4 medium) potatoes - cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1 lb chicken breasts - (boneless and skinless) - cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1 can whole kernel corn, drained - (8 3/4 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a shallow 1 1/2- to 2-quart microwave-safe dish.
2. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner. Microwave on HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes until just tender.
3. While the potatoes are cooking, heat a large nonstick skillet over high heat. Add and brown chicken in oil for 5 minutes.
4. Add potatoes; toss until lightly browned.
5. Add salsa and corn; toss until heated through.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt microwave. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
Menu: Warm Corn Tortillas, Orange and Red Onion Salad, Pineapple Spears
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 300 calories; 9 g fat; 50 mg cholesterol; 620 mg sodium; 34 g carbohydrate; 4 g fiber; 21 g protein.
